function.name: generate_adult_scene
function.description: Generate a detailed multi-scene adult images/script description in explicit scenes.

body_shape.description: Body shape description in one or a few words (e.g. slim, curvy, athletic)

hair_style.description: Hair style name (e.g. long straight black hair, short blonde bob)

wearing.description: Detailed description of what she is wearing. Can be fully clothed, partially clothed, or completely naked, with or without accessories.

male_character.description: optional, only have this part if there is a male in the plot

wearing.description: Detailed description of what she is wearing. Can be fully clothed, partially clothed, or completely naked, with or without accessories.

main_location.description: Short but clear location name (e.g. luxury bedroom, beach villa, dark alley)

lighting.description: Short lighting description (e.g. soft warm candlelight, neon nightclub lights, bright daylight)

art_type.description: Short art style description (e.g. realistic, anime, cinematic, photorealistic)

sex_loras.description: List of SD sex loras applying to the currect Comfyui workflow (e.g. ['blowjob', 'doggy_style']). put 'None' if it's not a explicit sex scene. Leave it none if it's just a normal scence without sex action

first_frame_image_prompt.description: Detailed SD-style image prompt. Must be completely self-contained: include full location description, full character appearance, exact clothing/nudity state, lighting, camera angle, composition, and mood. Do not reference any previous scenes.

scene_plot.description: a short description of the plot of current scence
